description: linode_monitor_service_dashboard_list envelope: count and the full proto MonitorDashboard elements for one service type. It reuses the MonitorDashboard element (widgets modeled as google.protobuf.Struct) but is a distinct list-response message from the top-level linode_monitor_dashboard_list. The tool keys off a required service_type path-id and has no filter param, so filter is omitted.
